arms_mandatory_baselines: in-context-text-definitions (the null most likely to win)

dependent_vars.definition: task + kernel-covered-slice accuracy (full metric vector V, F0 accounting)
dependent_vars.name: accuracy

dependent_vars.definition: total-system peak ledger per F0 §3.4 (V component)
dependent_vars.name: memory

dependent_vars.definition: FLOPs/query, p50/p95 latency, usd/query per F0 §3.3 — verifier NN-cleanup |lexicon|·D MACs on the ledger (V component)
dependent_vars.name: inference_compute

n_planned.authoring_cost: amortized kernel-authoring cost line (G9-measured $/concept Fable-class rate) on the V ledger; verdict must quote the break-even Q including authoring cost (RT-11)

endpoints.test: per-rung paired permutation over >=5 seeds, α=0.05, Holm across rungs (P1 HE4 verbatim); adapter arm must reach >=90% of LoRA accuracy at <=10% of its adaptation FLOPs and beat in-context text at matched inference cost

extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: P1 §4b row HE4 (verbatim): Measured range: 135M–1.7B. Envelope: Mechanism existence to 13–33B (ToolkenGPT measured there); effect size and the text-null comparison ≤1.7B, direction to 7B only via the F7 slice. Anchor: ToolkenGPT (LLaMA-13/33B) anchors the mechanism; the text-null overtaking prediction (Law 2) is the declared bias direction.
kill_criterion_verbatim: P1 §3 HE4 kill criterion (verbatim): 'Dead if the adapter arm is <90% of LoRA accuracy at every rung (per-rung paired permutation over ≥5 seeds, α=0.05, Holm across rungs), or if in-context text ≥ adapter arm at matched inference FLOPs/query (text-parity as a kill requires the text arm's Wilson lower bound ≥ the adapter arm's point estimate, or TOST equivalence at d = 0.5), or if ToolkenGPT-style per-concept trained embeddings match the adapter arm at comparable all-in cost with their per-concept training FLOPs included on the ledger (then a trained identifier does the job and the kernel content is unnecessary).' Plus the RT-11 binding authoring-cost accounting: the HE4 verdict must quote the break-even Q including authoring cost.

corpus_hashes._recipe: sha256 over the sorted concatenation of '<relpath>:<file-sha256>\n' lines for every file under data/<corpus>/
corpus_hashes.onboarding-domain-pack: PINNED-AT-INPUTS:d-dom (>=50 held-out D-DOM explications, URNs, vectors under the pinned encoder)

runner_constraints.note: post-F2 infrastructure decision deferred by the maintainer at GNG-0; these pins are set by ops amendment or at this record's own freeze

title: F4 — amortized concept-vocabulary onboarding vs LoRA / in-context text / ToolkenGPT-protocol embeddings (HE4; authoring-cost line on the ledger per RT-11)
